title: linum puberulum
intro: Linum puberulum, also known as the soft-leaved flax, is a species of flowering plant in the family Linaceae. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Linum puberulum include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting digestive health. Linum puberulum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or topical salve, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
